current.J_L: sqrt(|G|) R^2 L^2 partial_L S = R^2 k
current.J_sigma: 0 for the local stationary sigma branch

bohmian_decomposition.nodes_or_singularities: no node selected as physical scale; L=0 excluded boundary
bohmian_decomposition.quantum_hamilton_jacobi: 1/2 G^AB partial_A S partial_B S + U_BHSM + Q_BHSM = 0

canonical_dynamics.constraint: H_red/N = 0 in the lapse-parametrized reduced model
canonical_dynamics.hamiltonian: H_red = N [1/2 L^2 p_L^2 + 1/2 p_sigma^2 + U_BHSM(sigma)]

coordinate_singularities: L=0 is excluded as degenerate geometry
kinetic_metric.measure: dmu_Q = dL d sigma_scale / L = d(ln L) d sigma_scale
kinetic_metric.scale_transformation: L -> lambda L is translation ln L -> ln L + ln lambda

canonical_dynamics.lapse: N is retained as reparametrization multiplier in the reduced model
canonical_dynamics.potential: U_BHSM(L,sigma)= -1/2 alpha_scale sigma^2 + 1/4 beta_scale sigma^4; no L dependence
canonical_dynamics.reduced_action: S_red = integral d tau [(1/2N) G_AB qdot^A qdot^B - N U_BHSM(q)]

claim_boundary: BHSM v5.9 derives a minimal pilot-wave dynamics for the global scale modulus and scalar/topographic vacuum mode. The guidance law can generate an expanding actual configuration, but the quantum potential remains scale-covariant and does not derive ell_star, M_star, particle masses, gauge couplings, CKM values, rare-B observables, or full BHSM completion.
claim_safe_conclusion: BHSM v5.9 derives a minimal pilot-wave scale-modulus dynamics, including a quantum potential and expanding guidance trajectory. The construction remains globally scale covariant, so it does not lift the v5.8 absolute unit modulus or generate ell_star without a new BHSM-derived primordial boundary state or nonlinear geometric backreaction.
conditionally_established: pilot-wave dynamics can describe an outward compact-to-expanding actual configuration
sigma_scale=1/2 remains stationary in the local reduced branch
redshifted relics remain physical while boundary/topographic memory may be effective or virtual

coordinate_singularities: L=0 is excluded as degenerate geometry
configuration_space.measure: dmu_Q = dL d sigma_scale / L = d(ln L) d sigma_scale
configuration_space.scale_transformation: L -> lambda L is translation ln L -> ln L + ln lambda

derived: minimal pilot-wave ontology for Psi[Q] and Q_actual
scale-covariant configuration metric ds_Q^2=d(ln L)^2+d sigma_scale^2
reduced Hamiltonian and timeless wave equation
Bohmian quantum Hamilton-Jacobi, continuity, quantum potential, and guidance laws
analytic expanding guidance trajectory L(tau)=L_initial exp(k tau)

guided_trajectory.Psi: Psi(L,sigma)=R_sigma(sigma) exp(i k ln L / hbar)
guided_trajectory.Q_BHSM: independent of L for this branch
guided_trajectory.late_time_behavior: monotone expansion in configuration-space scale coordinate for k>0
guided_trajectory.method: analytic guidance integration on scale-covariant WKB branch
guided_trajectory.trajectory_stability: sigma remains at stable v5.7 branch; L has no finite attractor
guided_trajectory.turning_release_surface: outgoing current boundary condition; absolute turning L not derived

rows.reason: derived from dimensionless local Hessian only; not a length
no finite L box is imposed
translation in chi is scale covariance, not an anchor
degenerate boundary is not a stable finite scale
not selected to force scale generation
rescales covariantly and is not claimed physical

invalidated_or_ruled_out: pilot-wave dynamics alone does not derive ell_star
a Gaussian wavepacket width is not a BHSM unit anchor
a node or L=0 singularity is not a stable physical scale
factor ordering is not allowed to force scale generation

pilot_wave_ontology.R_and_S: amplitude and phase in Psi=R exp(iS/hbar)
pilot_wave_ontology.T_and_Phi: scalar/topographic fields inside Q_actual, not identical to Psi

primordial_boundary_state.flux_condition: outgoing branch k>0 can describe compact-to-expanding release
primordial_boundary_state.regularity_condition: finite current and no flux into L=0 degenerate geometry

primordial_to_late_time_map.actual_geometry: Q_actual follows the guidance law on the compact-to-expanding branch
primordial_to_late_time_map.effective_or_virtual_memory: boundary/topographic or quantum-potential response memory only
primordial_to_late_time_map.pilot_wave: universal wavefunctional continues on configuration space
primordial_to_late_time_map.redshifted_relics: physical on-shell relic matter/radiation, not virtual

scaling_audit.L_transformation: L -> lambda L; chi=ln L shifts by ln lambda

normalizable sigma fluctuation sector around sigma_scale=1/2
